title: fumaria agraria subsp. gaillardotii
intro: Fumaria agraria subsp. gaillardotii, also known as Gaillard's fumitory, is a subspecies of the Fumaria agraria plant, a type of flowering plant in the fumitory family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fumaria agraria subsp. gaillardotii include reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Fumaria agraria subsp. gaillardotii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in capsule or powder form.
